content:
Leo December 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month

Energy Theme Reflect on what brings true joy, rest in the private full moon
Key Dates New Moon Dec 7 (Sagittarius, 5th house) / Jupiter retrograde in your sign Dec 12 / Cold Full Moon Dec 24 (Cancer, 12th house)
Love 5th house New Moon refreshes romance and creative joy; Cold Moon in 12th asks for private rest
Career Jupiter retrograde in your sign is the year’s biggest review — refine self-presentation through February 2027
Crystal of the Month Citrine
Lucky Colors Gold, amber, sunset orange
Lucky Number 5
Affirmation I refine the self I present to the world; I rest in the private light that is mine alone.

This Month’s Energy

Leo, December 2026 closes the year with a defining moment in your own sign. The New Moon in Sagittarius on December 7 falls in your 5th house of romance, creative self-expression, and joy — a fresh start in what lights you up. Then Jupiter turns retrograde on December 12 at 27°01′ Leo — in your own sign, your 1st house — the most important review point of your year. And the Cold Full Moon in Cancer on December 24 lands in your 12th house of solitude, rest, and the unconscious — a tender, private close. December’s pattern is: claim the joy early, review the self deeply, rest in the dark late.

Key Dates for Leo in December 2026

Date Transit Meaning for Leo Do / Avoid
Dec 7 New Moon in Sagittarius (your 5th house) Fresh start in romance, creative projects, children, joy Do: begin the creative work, claim the romance, name what brings joy
Avoid: chasing empty attention instead of true joy
Dec 12 Jupiter turns retrograde in your sign (Leo) The most important review of 2026 for Leo — refinement of self, identity, leadership, presentation through February 2027 Do: refine how you present yourself, audit your roles, re-read the year
Avoid: launching a major new public identity before February 2027
Dec 15 Venus post-retrograde shadow ends Love and money conversations clarify; the Sun-ruled heart settles Do: commit to the value, finalize the relationship plan
Avoid: re-opening old Venus-retrograde worth-debates
Dec 21 Sun enters Capricorn (your 6th house) Capricorn season reorganizes daily work, routine, health through January Do: rebuild the daily rhythm that sustains the creative work
Avoid: running on charisma alone
Dec 24 Cold Full Moon in Cancer (your 12th house) Solitude, rest, dreams, the unconscious illuminated; a tender, private close to the year Do: rest, journal, honor what the year surfaced from the depths
Avoid: forcing public presence when the sky asks for privacy
Dec 31 Year-end threshold Natural review — what 2026 taught about self, joy, rest Do: name three roles you’ve refined, one rest you owe yourself
Avoid: rushing into January without the Jupiter-retrograde review begun

Career & Money

For Leo, December’s defining career moment is Jupiter turning retrograde in your own sign on December 12. This is the most important professional review of 2026. Jupiter has been expanding your identity, visibility, and leadership since it entered Leo in mid-2026 — now the expansion pauses and asks: does this self still fit? Refine how you present yourself, audit your roles, re-read the year.

The Sagittarius New Moon on December 7 (your 5th house) refreshes creative projects — begin the work that lights you up. Capricorn season (your 6th house) from December 21 rebuilds the daily systems that sustain it. Crystals for wealth can support the review; the practical move is claim the joy early, refine the self deeply, then rebuild the rhythm late.

Love & Relationships

The Sagittarius New Moon on December 7 falls in your 5th house of romance, joy, and creative self-expression. For Leo, this is the love signature of the month: romance is refreshable. Whether new love, a rekindling, or a creative partnership — the work is to name what brings true joy versus what feeds empty attention.

Venus finishes her post-retrograde shadow on December 15 — the Sun-ruled heart settles. The Cold Full Moon in Cancer on December 24 (your 12th house) asks for private rest, not public performance — a tender close to the year. Crystals for love can support the bond; the deeper practice is refine the self Jupiter retrograde is asking you to refine, then meet the other from that clarity.

Health & Wellness

December asks Leo to balance public and private. The 5th house Sagittarius New Moon lights creative fire, while the 12th house Cancer Cold Moon pulls you into rest, dreams, and solitude. Sun-ruled Leo carries tension in the heart, spine, and upper back — the weight of performed identity lands here.

Citrine, your crystal of the month, is traditionally associated with solar energy, warmth, abundance, and joy — a useful symbolic companion for dark-season morale. Heart-opening stretches, real solitude (not just alone-with-phone), and a creative practice that is for you, not for an audience, carry you into January. This is lifestyle guidance, not medical advice; persistent concerns belong with a clinician.

Crystal of the Month: Citrine

Why Citrine fits Leo this month. You are Sun-ruled and December asks you to do two things at once: refine the self Jupiter retrograde is reviewing, and rest in the private light of the Cold Moon. Citrine — traditionally tied to the sun, warmth, abundance, and joy — is the stone that carries the solar fire inward when the sky goes dark. Where Sunstone would radiate outward and Tiger’s Eye would ground, Citrine warms from within: golden, transparent, with a fire-sign kinship that mirrors your ruler. Perfect for the 5th house Sagittarius New Moon (joy) and the 12th house Cancer Cold Moon (private rest).

How to use it during December 2026. Place Citrine on your heart or solar plexus during meditation from December 7 (the Sagittarius New Moon). Keep it on your nightstand from December 12 onward (Jupiter retrograde through the Cold Moon).

Best date to use it: December 24, the Cold Full Moon in Cancer (your 12th house) — hold Citrine over your heart for 10 minutes in private at moonrise, naming the self you’re refining and the rest you owe yourself.

Read more: Citrine Meaning and Best Crystals for Leo.

Monthly Crystal Ritual for Leo — December 2026

When: December 24, the Cold Full Moon in Cancer (your 12th house).
Crystal: Citrine.
Intention: Refine the self; rest in the private light.

  1. Cleanse Citrine in moonlight on the night of December 7 (the Sagittarius New Moon). Place it on your creative workspace through December 12.
  2. Set the intention in the two weeks between the New Moon and the Cold Moon (December 7–24), especially during Jupiter retrograde (begins Dec 12): write down three roles you present to the world — and the one private self you want to refine through February 2027.
  3. Act at the Cold Full Moon on December 24: retire to a private space, light a single candle, hold Citrine over your heart, and speak aloud the role you’re refining and the rest you’re claiming. No audience. This is for you.
  4. Reflect at the Leo New Moon in August 2027 (your 1st house): how has the refinement matured through the spring? Hold Citrine during the review.

Shop Leo Crystals for December 2026

Want to build your monthly crystal toolkit? Explore the full Leo crystal guide for stones connected with confidence, courage, radiant self-expression, and solar joy — including the Citrine that carries the solar fire inward during Jupiter retrograde in your sign. Every stone is genuine, ethically sourced, and real — not dyed, not glass.

Frequently Asked Questions — Leo December 2026

Is December 2026 a good month for Leo?

It’s the most important review month of the year. Jupiter turns retrograde in your sign on December 12 — refine the self you present to the world. The Sagittarius New Moon (Dec 7, 5th house) refreshes joy; the Cold Moon (Dec 24, 12th house) asks for private rest.

How will Jupiter retrograde in Leo (Dec 12) affect Leo?

Jupiter has been expanding your identity, visibility, and leadership since mid-2026. From December 12 the expansion pauses for review: refine how you present yourself, audit your roles, re-read the year. Don’t launch a major new public identity before February 2027.

How will the Sagittarius New Moon on December 7 affect Leo?

It falls in your 5th house of romance, creative self-expression, and joy — a fresh start in what lights you up. Begin the creative work; claim the romance.

What does the Cold Moon in Cancer on December 24 mean for Leo?

It falls in your 12th house of solitude, rest, dreams, and the unconscious — a tender, private close to the year. Rest; journal; honor what the year surfaced from the depths.

What is the best crystal for Leo in December 2026?

Citrine — it carries the solar fire inward when the sky goes dark, exactly what a 5th house Sagittarius New Moon plus a 12th house Cancer Cold Moon (with Jupiter retrograde in your sign) demand. See the full Leo crystal guide →
